Title: Perfect World
Actors: Jinwen Chen, Luo Shang, Xiaoshuang Zhao
Plot: Shi hao is the main protagonist who is left in wild-land by his parents to let him grow safely in stone village where the god of the village can look after him. In the village Ancient village people live by killing monsters and are protected by their guardian spirit or their god. Shi hao is mainly a prince but because of human greed undergoes a life threatening incident but is saved by the god of the stone village and is left in the village to safeguard him from the people who wanted to kill him. As he grows up, he asks about his parents from the god spirit but the God tells him to become stronger and lift thousand kilo catties furnace given by the god and when he will be able to do that, he will get to know his parents whereabouts. It is mainly very interesting and amazing story and as the story progresses it becomes more interesting to watch. It is amazingly executed by the animators. I didn't find anything lacking in this masterpiece. IT IS HIGHLY RECOMMENDED TO WATCH AND I ENJOYED IT A LOT.
